name: Inroads
description_short: Member-owned credit union in St. Helens, OR offering financial services with strong community involvement and highly-rated customer service since the 1970s.
description_long:
InRoads Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving the St. Helens, Oregon community. The organization has maintained member relationships for decades, with some members reporting affiliation since the 1970s. As a credit union, InRoads operates under NCUA insurance and is structured to prioritize member benefits over corporate profits.

InRoads offers core financial services typical of credit unions, including share accounts, share certificates, lending products (auto loans, personal loans, borrowing services), and drive-through and ATM access. The credit union emphasizes financial education and has a state-of-the-art website for member management. Specific services highlighted include assistance with vehicle replacement financing and general borrowing needs.

The credit union distinguishes itself through consistent positive member feedback regarding staff courtesy, helpfulness, and personalized service. Members report that employees go above and beyond standard banking interactions, handling complex transactions with member interests prioritized. The organization is actively involved in community engagement, including financial education programs, team sponsorships, food bank support, and school giving.

Limitations include limited branch presence (single St. Helens location) and restricted hours (closed weekends and Fridays), which may inconvenience some members. The website data shows conflicting closure status information, suggesting possible operational uncertainty at time of indexing. For members in the immediate St. Helens area seeking personalized service and community-focused banking, InRoads provides value; however, those requiring extended hours or multiple locations should consider alternatives.
services: Member assistance with complex financial transactions
pros: 4.2-star rating based on 83 member reviews with consistent praise for customer service quality
Staff described as extremely courteous, polite, helpful, and well-informed across multiple reviews
Handles complex financial transactions (vehicle financing, borrowing) in member's best interest with minimal stress
State-of-the-art website that members report is easy to use for account management
Active community involvement including financial education, team sponsorships, food banks, and school support
Drive-through service and ATM access available at main location
Long-standing member relationships (members since 1970s report consistent quality)
cons: Single location in St. Helens limits accessibility for members outside immediate area
Limited hours (closed Fridays, Saturdays, Sundays; only 10AM-5:30PM weekdays) restrict member access
Website shows conflicting operational status (both permanent and temporary closure indicators), creating uncertainty
No information provided about specific loan products, rates, APRs, or membership eligibility requirements
Small credit union with limited branch network compared to larger financial institutions
best_for: St. Helens area residents seeking personalized, relationship-based banking with strong community ties
Members prioritizing customer service quality and staff expertise over convenience and extended hours
Borrowers needing assistance with auto loans and vehicle financing in a supportive, stress-free environment
Community-minded individuals who value supporting local institutions with active civic engagement
diagnosis: InRoads Credit Union is best for St. Helens-area members who prioritize personalized service, community involvement, and staff expertise over convenience and extended access hours. The main caveat is the single location with limited weekday-only hours and conflicting operational status information that suggests potential closure or restructuring—prospective members should verify current operational status before joining.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Inroads — Credit Union in Saint Helens, OR | CreditDoc
meta_description: Inroads — NCUA-insured credit union in Saint Helens, OR. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
